title: 🤑 PM Mudra Loan Apply Online 2026: Eligibility, Interest Rate, and Application Process 📈
metaTitle: PM Mudra Loan Online Application 2026 | Eligibility, Interest Rate, and Process
metaDescription: Apply for PM Mudra Loan online in 2026 and get funding for your business. Check eligibility, interest rate, and application process 🏦

intro.heading: 🤑 Introduction to PM Mudra Loan
intro.content: The PM Mudra Loan is a government-backed scheme that provides financial assistance to small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) and startups in India 🇮🇳. The scheme was launched in 2015 by the Prime Minister of India, Narendra Modi, with the aim of promoting entrepreneurship and job creation in the country 🌟. Under this scheme, borrowers can avail loans of up to ₹10 lakhs to fund their business ventures 🤑. In this article, we will guide you through the eligibility criteria, interest rate, and application process for PM Mudra Loan online in 2026 📈.

sections.heading: 📝 Eligibility Criteria for PM Mudra Loan
sections.content: To be eligible for a PM Mudra Loan, you must meet the following criteria: ✅ You must be an Indian citizen 🇮🇳. ✅ You must be above 18 years of age 🎂. ✅ You must have a business plan or a proposal for a new business venture 📊. ✅ Your business must be in the manufacturing, trading, or services sector 🏭. ✅ You must not have any pending loans or credit card debt 🚫. The eligibility criteria may vary depending on the lender and the type of loan you are applying for 📝.

sections.heading: 📊 Interest Rate and Repayment Terms
sections.content: The interest rate for PM Mudra Loan varies between 8.5% to 12.5% per annum 📊. The repayment term for the loan is typically between 3 to 5 years 🕒. The interest rate and repayment term may vary depending on the lender and the type of loan you are applying for 📝. It is essential to check the interest rate and repayment terms before applying for the loan to ensure that you can afford the monthly installments 💸.

sections.heading: 📈 Application Process for PM Mudra Loan
sections.content: To apply for a PM Mudra Loan online, follow these steps: ✅ Visit the official website of the lender or the government portal 🌐. ✅ Fill out the online application form with your personal and business details 📝. ✅ Upload the required documents, such as your business plan, identity proof, and address proof 📁. ✅ Submit the application form and wait for the lender to verify your details 🕒. ✅ Once your application is approved, the loan amount will be disbursed to your bank account 🤑.

sections.heading: 📁 Required Documents for PM Mudra Loan
sections.content: To apply for a PM Mudra Loan, you will need to provide the following documents: ✅ Business plan or proposal 📊. ✅ Identity proof, such as Aadhaar card or PAN card 📝. ✅ Address proof, such as passport or driving license 📍. ✅ Bank statement and income tax returns 📊. ✅ Proof of business existence, such as registration certificate or GST certificate 📈. The required documents may vary depending on the lender and the type of loan you are applying for 📝.

faqs.q: What is the maximum loan amount that can be availed under PM Mudra Loan?
faqs.a: The maximum loan amount that can be availed under PM Mudra Loan is ₹10 lakhs 🤑.

faqs.q: What is the interest rate for PM Mudra Loan?
faqs.a: The interest rate for PM Mudra Loan varies between 8.5% to 12.5% per annum 📊.

faqs.q: What is the repayment term for PM Mudra Loan?
faqs.a: The repayment term for PM Mudra Loan is typically between 3 to 5 years 🕒.
